sentence: go to demoqa.com/select-menu and choose 'Group 2, option 1' from the multi-level select menu

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Select Menu Page
workflow.description: Locate the 'Select One' multi-level select menu and choose 'Group 2, option 1'.
triggers: If the current URL contains demoqa.com/select-menu
If a dropdown with label 'Select One' is visible
actions: Click the dropdown with label 'Select One'

workflow.name: Option Selected
workflow.description: Confirm that 'Group 2, option 1' has been successfully selected and is displayed.
triggers: If the current URL contains demoqa.com/select-menu
If the text 'Group 2, option 1' is visible within the 'Select One' dropdown
